Agarwal Group — 1, 2 & 3 BHK Flats for Sale in Vasai–Virar & Mumbai, Mumbai

Agarwal Group is a leading real estate developer building RERA-registered 1, 2 and 3 BHK flats, apartments and integrated townships in Virar West, Vasai–Virar & Mumbai within the Mumbai Metropolitan Region. With 47+ years of trust since 1978 and 30+ delivered projects, we offer ready-possession homes with no GST. Explore ongoing and completed residential projects in Virar and book a site visit today.

About Us

A Legacy Built on Trust & Craftsmanship

Since 1978, the Agarwal Group has been the cornerstone of residential development across the Vasai–Virar sub-region of Mumbai. What began as a vision to create thoughtfully designed homes has evolved into a legacy of excellence spanning generations of families.

Each Agarwal residence is a testament to our unwavering commitment — spaces that blend intelligent architecture with world-class amenities, positioned in the most promising locations of the Mumbai Metropolitan Region.

Read more →
Quality LivingEvery detail crafted with precision.
On-Time DeliveryA commitment upheld for decades.
RERA CompliantTransparent, accountable practices.
Community FirstNeighbourhoods that thrive together.

"We don't just build structures — we build the places where life's greatest chapters unfold."

FAQ

Questions, Answered

Everything you need to know before making an Agarwal address your home.

Our residences are spread across the Vasai–Virar & Mumbai region, positioned close to the railway stations and with seamless access to the Western Express Highway — keeping you well connected to the wider Mumbai Metropolitan Region.
We offer thoughtfully designed 1, 2 & 3 BHK homes (with select 1RK options) across our ongoing and completed developments, so you can choose the layout that best fits your family and budget.
Yes. All Agarwal Group developments are RERA registered, and the relevant registration details are available on request — part of our long-standing commitment to transparent, accountable practices.
Several of our projects are ready-possession homes that have received their Occupancy Certificate, so you can move in without a long wait — while others are at various stages of construction.
Absolutely. Our projects are approved by leading national banks and financial institutions, which makes securing a home loan straightforward and hassle-free.
Residents enjoy a complete world of leisure — from the Club One clubhouse, swimming pool and sports courts to landscaped gardens, jogging tracks and children's play areas, all within the community.
Simply reach out through the enquiry form, WhatsApp or a quick call, and our team will arrange a site visit at a time that suits you.

Landmark Townships

Self-sufficient communities with schools, temples, clubs and lush green spaces — all within your neighbourhood.

Prime Connectivity

Strategically located near Vasai–Virar & Mumbai railway stations, with seamless access to the Western Express Highway.

Value Advantage

Own a premium home with financial benefits that make your purchase even more rewarding.

Bank Approved

All projects are approved by leading national banks and institutions, enabling hassle-free home loans.
